Introduction to The FAATT
Framework
The FAATT Framework
Welcome.
FAATT stands for Facebook Ads Attribution & Tracking Trinity.
It's the model I put together to provide the know-how to add the best tracking
for Facebook ads and to provide you with the tools to attribute your ad spend
better.
I've used many 3rd party tracking solutions - and there is no 'bad' system, they
all work in their own ways. Some better than others.
And by now you should know my view:
Unless you're making mid to high 7-figures and/or running extensive multi-
channel marketing campaigns (meaning you have at least 3 inbound traffic
sources paid or non-paid) then you don't need the 3rd party tools.
The FAATT Framework is designed for the 80% of advertisers that NEED
enhanced tracking and insights but do not require the monthly fees and
complex set up.
The following modules are designed to ease you in and take you deep into
improved decision making, so that in the new world ads decision making.
As long as you've run ads before and are happy getting a little technical on the
setup (though I've tried to keep this as simple for the majority) this will guide you
towards better optimising every dollar and dime you put into your ad
campaigns.
Oh, and don't forget to join our supportive ads group to share ideas, learnings
and wins!
Knowing that this training has made a positive impact on your business is everything
for me and the team.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
